description: Style Notecatwalk takes the sandal trend a notch higher with this pair. Wear this lovely versatile pair with harem pants, denims or leggings and look perfect. This pair is designed to Fit your foot snugly without making it seem bulky. Grab them before its too late!Product DetailsTurquoise blue sandal with straps criss-crossing over the forefoot region and a cup for the back heelCriss crossing elasticated midfoot strapsA padded and curved footbedTPU outsole with a floral lug at the heel and branded grooves at the forefootMaterial and CareSynthetic, fabricDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
